source_description: Issue #29 — Tutorial / Act-1-Onboarding-Flow. Phase 1 of Vertical Slice Epic #32. Guided 12-step onboarding for first-time players covering hub tour, combat intro, loot/equip flow, NPC dialog, save concept. Auto-skip via hasSave(); manual skip + replay via Settings. Druckerei step uses stub dialog (Issue #24 deferred). Wave 1 not dampened. Target highlight via glow/outline (no arrow asset).
